acholi.convert_the_math_behind_units: Convert — math ma tye i cok units
acholi.conversion_factor_ratio_equal_to_1_e_g: Conversion factor = ratio ma rom ki 1 (labolle, 1 ft = 12 in → 12 in / 1 ft). Nyathidit kwede loko unit ma pe loko value. SI prefixes (kilo, milli) gin powers me 10 — golo decimal keken.
acholi.length_mass_volume_temperature_time_en: Bor, mass, volume, temperature, kare, energy, pressure. Rule acel ma piretek: lub units i step ducu. Ka answer ni agiki tye i m² ka onongo imito seconds, ityeko bal kabedo mo malo.
acholi.daily_life_conversions_f_c_mph_km_h_lb: Conversions me nino ducu (°F↔°C, mph↔km/h, lb↔kg) ki AP / SAT / lab measurements. Lapeny acel-acel nyuto conversion factor nge idwoko, mumiyo iger muscle memory.
acholi.word_problem_apply_in_context: Word problem — tii ki i context
acholi.real_world_unit_conversion_scenarios_g: Real-world unit-conversion scenarios: gas mileage, recipe scaling, dosage calculations, travel-distance estimates. Word problems gin 80% reading comprehension + 20% conversion math.
acholi.every_si_prefix_is_a_power_of_10_slide: SI prefix acel-acel aye power me 10. Slide source ki target exponents me winyo kit ma scales pat pat ki — skill madit ma tye i cok scientific notation ki Fermi estimates.
acholi.test_your_unit_conversion_knowledge: Tem ngec ni me unit conversion!
acholi.question: 🧠 Lapeny
acholi.click_generate_for_an_ai_crafted_word_: Dii Generate pi word problem ma AI oyubo
acholi.5_8_oom_biology_to_geology_scales: 5-8 OOM — scales me biology o geology.
acholi.adjust_source_and_target_exponents_10_: Loko source ki target exponents (10^N). Widget poko magnitude change i bands 5 ma pat pat. Pe score, pe reveal.
acholi.hypothesis_what_real_world_examples_sp: Hypothesis: Real-world examples mene ma o i magnitude band acel-acel?
acholi.compare_cm_km_mm_light_year_how_many_o: Pim cm→km, mm→light-year. OOM adi acel-acel?
acholi.why_are_scientists_trained_in_orders_o: Pingo kipwonyo scientists i orders of magnitude?
acholi.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Aniang — tit ki lok ni kikom
acholi.explain_why_dimensional_reasoning_acro: Tit pingo dimensional reasoning i kom OOM mapol tek.
acholi.design_note_discrete_5_state_magnitude: Design note: discrete 5-state magnitude marker; pe error score; pe reveal — by design.
acholi.metric_prefixes_powers_of_10_from_atom: 🔬 Metric Prefixes — Powers me 10 ki i atoms o galaxies
